pdg_node.statement: (target: callable log_prob oracle, initial_positions: array[float], step_size: float, n_leapfrog: int, seed: int) -> tuple[StateModelSpec, object]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Construct immutable HMC state and static kernel parameters, including explicit RNG state (PRNGKey/seed-derived state).

declaration.name: initializehmcstate
declaration.type_signature: (target: callable log_prob oracle, initial_positions: array[float], step_size: float, n_leapfrog: int, seed: int) -> tuple[StateModelSpec, object]
declaration.docstring: Construct immutable HMC state and static kernel parameters, including explicit RNG state (PRNGKey/seed-derived state).
declaration.conceptual_summary: Reproducible Gradient-Kernel State Bootstrap. Builds an immutable initial state for a gradient-informed iterative transition process by evaluating a differentiable scalar-field oracle at an initial tensor point and storing the point, scalar value, local derivative, random generator state, and trace container. In parallel, it factorizes constant transition hyperparameters into a static kernel object so per-iteration updates can reuse fixed settings without reconfiguration. If a seed is provided, stochastic behavior is made exactly replayable under identical inputs and numeric conditions.. Applications: Computational chemistry: initializing reproducible trajectory-based exploration of high-dimensional energy landscapes for molecular conformations., Geophysical inverse modeling: bootstrapping iterative state transitions for parameter-field reconstruction from indirect sensor measurements., Robotics system identification: initializing gradient-informed stochastic search over dynamic model parameters with replayable randomness., Medical image reconstruction: setting up reproducible iterative posterior exploration for latent volume parameters under differentiable forward models.
